title: One Day Hike Ella
subtitle: A premium guided loop through Ella's greatest highlights
shortDescription: A comprehensive 15.4km trek covering Nine Arch Bridge, Ella Rock, Kithalella Waterfall, and Ravana Cave & Temple, led by expert guides with emergency support.
description1: The Ella area is a tourist attraction with a lot of breathtaking views. This hiking activity is 15.4km long and is led by a skilled guide. An emergency unit is ready to provide services at any time.
description2: Your journey begins in Ella City at 08:00 AM, wrapping up around 03:00 PM. Along the loop, you will hike through active tea plantations, cross the historical Nine Arch Bridge, ascend the iconic Ella Rock summit, rest near the cooling Kithalella Waterfall, and explore the ancient Ravana Cave and Temple. An emergency support vehicle is stationed nearby to ensure a safe and relaxing experience.
highlights: 15.4km scenic loop trek
Guided by a certified local expert
Emergency medical unit ready at any time
Cover 4 major Ella landmarks in one day
Traditional trail snacks and lunch included
Hike Nine Arch Bridge, Ella Rock, Kithalella Waterfall & Ravana Cave

itinerary.activity: Start from Ella City center, briefing and safety check
Cross the Nine Arch Bridge, photo session
Hike through Kithalella Waterfall and surrounding tea paths
Reach Ella Rock Summit, panoramic picnic lunch
Descend and explore ancient Ravana Cave & Temple
Return to Ella City (End of trek)

title: Waterfall Ride Adventure
subtitle: Discover hidden streams and cooling highland cascades
shortDescription: Explore Ella's misty waterfall valleys on custom mountain bikes, visit Ravana Falls, and take a refreshing dip in secret natural plunge pools.
description1: Ride through the lush mountain bypasses of Ella on custom mountain bikes, stopping at major cascading waterfalls. This tour combines adventure and nature as you cruise down valleys lined with dense tree canopies and ancient cliffs.
description2: Learn about the local geology and hydrologic systems of the Central Highlands. A cooling swim in a secret mountain pool is included, followed by a warm tea tasting at a roadside wooden shack overlooking the tea valleys.
highlights: Mountain bike down beautiful valley paths
Swim in secret freshwater plunge pools
Experienced safety rider guide
Visit Ravana Falls and surrounding cascades
Roadside tea tasting session

itinerary.activity: Meet at shop, safety brief and bike fitting
Begin downhill ride into Ravana Valley
Visit Ravana Falls, photography session
Ride to secret jungle natural pools, swim time
Traditional tea tasting and snacks
Return transport to Ella town center

title: Sunrise Hike
subtitle: Golden rays casting over the misty mountain gaps
shortDescription: A gentle early morning walk through tea gardens to the peak of Little Adam's Peak to watch the sunrise over the Ella Gap.
description1: Wake before dawn and follow a guide through quiet tea paths. The summit of Little Adam's Peak offers a spectacular vantage point to watch the valley light up in orange and magenta.
description2: Perfect for families and photographers. Enjoy a freshly brewed cup of Ceylon tea at the summit while listening to the waking sounds of the highland forests.
highlights: Watch the sunrise over the iconic Ella Gap
Easy walk accessible for all fitness levels
Trek through lush green tea plantations
Freshly brewed mountain tea at the summit
Great photo spots along the ridge line
included: Pick up from Ella town hotels

itinerary.activity: Pick up and transfer to trail head
Start hike through quiet tea gardens
Arrive at summit, set up tea spot
Sunrise over the mountains
Descend via alternate route
Return to your accommodation

title: Discovering Natural Pools
subtitle: Trek to secret river pools hidden deep in the forest
shortDescription: A cooling wilderness trek off the beaten track to swim in pristine natural rock pools and streams surrounded by tropical foliage.
description1: Avoid the crowded tourist spots and trek with a local naturalist guide to secret freshwater pools fed by clean mountain springs.
description2: Spot exotic birds, freshwater crabs, and beautiful tropical butterflies. The pools are completely natural, surrounded by boulders and thick green ferns, perfect for a refreshing afternoon dip.
highlights: Trek off-grid paths unknown to tourists
Swim in clear natural rock plunge pools
Naturalist guide explains local flora & fauna
Quiet and peaceful wilderness setting
Small group size ensures high safety
included: Fresh coconut water and fruit platter

itinerary.activity: Meet at trail head, safety brief
Enter jungle trails, flora walkthrough
Arrive at first cascade, rock pool swim
Picnic lunch and fruit platter by the stream
Return hike through bamboo groves
End of trek, transport back to Ella

title: Trails
subtitle: Curated hiking trails customized to your pace and goals
shortDescription: Tailored trail packages matching your fitness level, spanning historical forest paths, pine forests, and panoramic ridges.
description1: Our custom trails allow you to choose your difficulty and destinations. Whether you want a quiet forest walk or a rugged ridge-line trek, we have a route for you.
description2: All trails are guided by local pathfinders who know every ridge and shortcut. Great for nature lovers, couples, and groups seeking a private outdoor experience.
highlights: Fully customizable itinerary and duration
Select your difficulty (Easy to Extreme)
Pass through hidden viewpoints and pine forests
Private guide for you and your group
Flexible starting and ending times

itinerary.activity: Hotel pick up and route briefing
Trek customized route through Ella hills
Lunch / Snack break at a panoramic view point
Return transfer to accommodation

title: Village Life Tracking
subtitle: Walk through remote villages and experience local highland traditions
shortDescription: Walk through traditional farming villages, meet local families, and learn about highland agriculture and crafts.
description1: A beautiful walk through paddy fields, vegetable plots, and home gardens. Discover how rural villagers live in harmony with the surrounding hills.
description2: Enjoy a traditional herbal drink at a villager's home, observe ancient farming techniques, and learn about the local community's lifestyle and crafts.
highlights: Walk through working paddy fields and home gardens
Meet local villagers and enjoy traditional hospitality
Learn about highland agriculture and cultivation
Enjoy traditional herbal tea and local treats
Peaceful and authentic cultural immersion

itinerary.activity: Transfer to rural valley village
Walk through vegetable plots and paddy fields
Visit a local home, herbal tea break
Demonstration of traditional farming tools
Traditional home-cooked village lunch
Return transfer to Ella town

title: Kithul Tour
subtitle: Discover the ancient craft of Kithul syrup tapping
shortDescription: Trek into Kithul palm groves, witness syrup tapping demonstrations, and taste fresh Kithul sweet treats with tapper families.
description1: Kithul syrup tapping is a traditional Sri Lankan craft handed down through generations. Visit a local family of tappers in the forest and see how they harvest the sap.
description2: Learn about the processing of syrup and jaggery (palm sugar). Taste warm Kithul honey poured over fresh buffalo curd—a delicious and authentic Sri Lankan delicacy.
highlights: Trek into natural Kithul palm groves
Witness live tapping demonstration by experts
Learn processing of syrup and jaggery sugar
Taste fresh curd and Kithul honey treat
Support local artisanal family business

itinerary.activity: Depart Ella town for foothills
Guided walk in forest Kithul palm groves
Witness tapping demo, sap collection talk
Syrup boiling demonstration
Curd and Kithul honey tasting session
Return transfer to Ella town

title: Riverside Cooking
subtitle: Prepare and enjoy an authentic Sri Lankan meal by the riverbank
shortDescription: Gather wild herbs, cook traditional clay-pot curry dishes by the river, and dine in a peaceful wilderness setting.
description1: A culinary adventure in nature. Hike to a beautiful spot on the riverbank, build a wood-fire stove, and learn to cook authentic clay-pot curry dishes.
description2: Using local spices, coconut milk, and fresh vegetables, you'll prepare several traditional recipes. Enjoy your feast on banana leaves while listening to the rushing river water.
highlights: Cook outdoors using traditional clay pots
Learn to use Sri Lankan spices and coconut milk
Beautiful and relaxing riverside setting
Hike through fields to collect fresh wild herbs
Enjoy your meal served on banana leaves
included: Recipe card sheets to take home

itinerary.activity: Transfer to river valley trail head
Hike to riverside collecting wild herbs
Build wood fire, prepare ingredients
Cook traditional curry dishes
Dine by the river bank on banana leaves
Clean up and return transfer to Ella
